system.effect: This spell allows the sorcerer to see images of distant creatures, objects, or places. This requires a mirror, a crystal, or a clear pool, through which the visions will be seen. The caster must know the creature, object, or place being viewed. Otherwise, they must have a sample of the creature or object such as a hair clipping or a paint chip. The vision lasts 1 turn, and the sorcerer must concentrate and remain motionless while scrying.
system.critSuccess: The spell lasts 1 hour rather than 1 turn.
